outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Trump says US will start guiding ships through Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: CNN leads with Project Freedom — Trump announces US Navy escort of ~2,000 stranded ships from Monday. Also covers Trump rejecting Iran 14-point plan and contradictory 'positive discussions' post.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump says the US will 'guide' stranded ships from the Strait of Hormuz, starting on Monday
outlets.summary: WaPo emphasizes humanitarian framing vs. military escalation risk. Notes ~20,000 seafarers stranded. CENTCOM deploying 15,000 troops for the operation.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump defends war in Iran as fragile ceasefire holds; announces Project Freedom
outlets.summary: Fox frames ceasefire and Project Freedom as Trump successes. Covers Bessent 'suffocating' Iran. Highlights $8.6B arms expedited. Treasury 'Economic Fury' sanctions.

outlets.name: Fox Business
outlets.headline: Trump declares Iran war is 'very close to being over'
outlets.summary: Fox Business strikes optimistic tone on peace prospects despite Trump rejecting Iran's 14-point plan same day.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump announces plan to escort ships stuck in Hormuz Strait
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera rolling liveblog covers Project Freedom, Trump's contradictory messaging on peace, IDF strikes killing 20 in Lebanon, and Hezbollah fiber-optic drone threat.

outlets.name: PBS NewsHour
outlets.headline: Trump says U.S. will help guide stranded ships from Strait of Hormuz starting Monday
outlets.summary: PBS covers Project Freedom with focus on humanitarian angle — 20,000 stranded seafarers. Notes CENTCOM committing 15,000 service members.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: May 3: Trump says US launching effort to 'guide' stranded ships out of Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog covers Project Freedom, Netanyahu F-35/F-15IA procurement and counter-drone project, Bessent 'suffocating' Iran, and CENTCOM 49 vessels redirected.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Child, medics among 20 killed by Israel in Lebanon, Beirut health ministry says
outlets.summary: Haaretz leads with Lebanon casualties: 20 killed May 3 including a child, 4 paramedics, 3 foreign workers. Total now 2,679 killed since March 2.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Rezaee: Iran can create 'graveyard' of American warships if fighting resumes
outlets.summary: Iranian media amplifies Mohsen Rezaee's threat of US warship 'graveyard.' IRGC warns hostilities 'likely' to resume. Frames Project Freedom as provocative escalation.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian, Ghalibaf push to fire FM Araghchi — IRGC power struggle deepens
outlets.summary: Iran International reports growing rift between civilian government and IRGC. Pezeshkian/Ghalibaf seeking Araghchi's removal for acting as IRGC commander Vahidi's aide rather than cabinet minister.
